channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GLOBECIVIL] Globe Civil Projects Ltd Receives Notice of Demand under Section 156 of Income Tax Act, 1961
item.description:
Globe Civil Projects Ltd has received a notice of demand under section 156 of the Income Tax Act, 1961 from the office of the Dy. Commissioner of Income Tax Central Circle-27, Delhi for the AY 2018-19, imposing a total demand of Rs. 80,19,790/-. The company is analyzing the order and will take appropriate action including filing an appeal before the Deputy Commissioner (Appeals) of Income-tax/ Commissioner of Income-tax (Appeals)-29, New Delhi. The penalty does not have a material impact on the financials, operations, or other activities of the company.

  • Globe Civil Projects Ltd received a notice of demand under section 156 of the Income Tax Act, 1961
  • The demand is for the AY 2018-19 and amounts to Rs. 80,19,790/-
  • The company is analyzing the order and will take appropriate action
  • The penalty does not have a material impact on the company's financials, operations, or other activities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Globe Civil Projects Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [SWISSMLTRY] Trading Window of Swiss Military Consumer Goods Ltd to Close from April 1, 2026
item.description:
Swiss Military Consumer Goods Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's insider trading policy. The closure will take effect from April 1, 2026, and will reopen after 48 hours from the announcement of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the board meeting to consider and approve the audited financial results will be announced in due course.

  • Trading window of Swiss Military Consumer Goods Ltd to close from April 1, 2026
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and company's insider trading policy
  • To reopen after 48 hours from the announcement of audited financial results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026
  • Date of board meeting to consider and approve the audited financial results to be announced later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Swiss Military Consumer Goods Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TEXINFRA] Adventz Securities Enterprises Acquires 3.60% Stake in Texmaco Infrastructure & Holdings
item.description:
Adventz Securities Enterprises Ltd. has acquired 3,60,000 equity shares of Texmaco Infrastructure & Holdings Limited on 27th March, 2026. This acquisition has increased their total holding in the company to 3.60% of the total paid up Share Capital. The acquisition was made through the open market. The total equity share capital of Texmaco Infrastructure & Holdings Limited is 12,74,26,590 Equity Shares of Re 1/- each fully paid up, both before and after the acquisition.

  • Adventz Securities Enterprises Ltd. has acquired 3,60,000 equity shares of Texmaco Infrastructure & Holdings Limited.
  • The acquisition has increased their total holding in the company to 3.60% of the total paid up Share Capital.
  • The acquisition was made through the open market.
  • The total equity share capital of Texmaco Infrastructure & Holdings Limited is 12,74,26,590 Equity Shares of Re 1/- each fully paid up.
  • The acquisition does not affect the total diluted share/voting capital of the TC.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TEXMACO INFRASTRUCTURE & HOLDINGS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [IGPL] IG Petrochemicals Achieves Mechanical Completion of Plasticizer Plant
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IG Petrochemicals Ltd has announced the mechanical completion of its Plasticizer plant. This information is shared in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations 2015 and Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • IG Petrochemicals Ltd has successfully completed the mechanical stage of its Plasticizer plant.
  • This achievement is in compliance with the SEBI regulations for disclosure requirements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: I G PETROCHEMICALS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [VHL] Vardhman Holdings Ltd Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After FY2026 Results Release
item.description:
Vardhman Holdings Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window from 1st April, 2026 (09:00 a.m.) until 48 hours after the Audited Financial Results for the financial year ending 31st March, 2026 are made public, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Vardhman Holdings Ltd has closed its trading window from 1st April, 2026.
  • The trading window will remain closed until 48 hours after the Audited Financial Results for FY2026 are made public.
  • This closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The Audited Financial Results for FY2026 are expected to be released after 31st March, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VARDHMAN HOLDINGS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [BCLIL] Promoter Rajinder Mittal Acquires 145,000 Shares in BCL Industries Ltd.
item.description:
Rajinder Mittal, a promoter of BCL Industries Limited, has purchased 145,000 shares of the company on 27th March 2026. This disclosure is made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The total shares carrying voting rights after the acquisition are 44,770,912 with a 15.16% stake in the company.

  • Rajinder Mittal, a promoter of BCL Industries Ltd., purchased 145,000 shares on 27th March 2026.
  • The total shares carrying voting rights after the acquisition are 44,770,912.
  • The stake of Rajinder Mittal in the company increased to 15.16% after the acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BCL Industries Ltd-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ELECTCAST] Promoter Group's Badrinath Industries Acquires 20,08,825 Equity Shares of Electrosteel Castings Ltd for Rs 16,06,79,637.81
item.description:
Badrinath Industries Limited, a part of the Promoter Group of Electrosteel Castings Limited, has purchased an aggregate of 20,08,825 Equity shares of the company on 27th March, 2026 through the National Stock Exchange of India Limited. The total cost of the acquisition is Rs 16,06,79,637.81.

  • Badrinath Industries Limited, a Promoter Group company, has acquired 20,08,825 Equity shares of Electrosteel Castings Limited.
  • The total cost of the acquisition is Rs 16,06,79,637.81.
  • The shares were purchased on 27th March, 2026 through the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.
  • This acquisition increases Badrinath Industries' holding in Electrosteel Castings Limited to 31,46,071 Equity shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELECTROSTEEL CASTINGS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [WOSAL] Trading Window Closure Announced by Western Overseas Study Abroad Ltd
item.description:
Western Overseas Study Abroad Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their relatives, effective from 1st April 2026. The closure will last until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the half year and financial year ending 31st March 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the approval of these financial results is yet to be announced.

  • Trading window closure announced for Western Overseas Study Abroad Ltd
  • Closure effective from 1st April 2026
  • To last until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the year ended 31st March 2026
  • Board Meeting date for approval of financial results yet to be announced
  • Closure applicable to all designated persons and their relatives

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Western Overseas Study Abroad Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PUNJABCHEM] Punjab Chemicals & Crop Protection Ltd: Ishika Shalil Shroff Acquires Shares Worth 0.02%
item.description:
Punjab Chemicals and Crop Protection Limited has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Ishika Shalil Shroff, who is a part of the Promoter Group. The disclosure is in relation to the acquisition of shares carrying voting rights. The details of the acquisition, as well as the holdings of the Promoter and Promoter Group before and after the acquisition, are provided in the disclosure.

  • Ishika Shalil Shroff, part of the Promoter Group, has acquired shares of Punjab Chemicals and Crop Protection Limited.
  • The acquisition is worth 0.02% of the total shares and voting rights.
  • The acquisition was made through the open market on 27-03-2026.
  • The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company have been affected by the acquisition.
  • The holdings of the Promoter and Promoter Group have been updated accordingly.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB CHEMICALS AND CROP PROTECTION LTD.-$ | Category: Investment

item.title: [MAGNUM] Magnum Ventures Ltd Closes Trading Window in Compliance with SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Magnum Ventures Ltd, in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, has announced the closure of the trading window for the company's directors, officers, designated persons, and their immediate relatives. The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the financial results for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026 are made publicly available. This move is aimed at ensuring transparency and fairness in trading activities.

  • Magnum Ventures Ltd has closed the trading window in compliance with SEBI regulations.
  • The closure is effective from 1st April, 2026.
  • The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the financial results for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026 are made public.
  • The closure applies to directors, officers, designated persons, and their immediate relatives.
  • This move is aimed at ensuring transparency and fairness in trading activities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAGNUM VENTURES LTD. | Category: Business Update
